extra.reasoning: The input stiff_neck appears in no rule. The output acuity is determined solely by back_pain and dizziness: r1 (priority 2) and r2 (priority 2) each set acuity := urgent when their condition holds, and the default sets acuity := routine otherwise. Therefore the only reachable acuity values are urgent (if back_pain or dizziness) and routine (neither). Flipping stiff_neck from false to true, with back_pain and dizziness unchanged, leaves the computed acuity exactly equal in every case, since stiff_neck never participates in any rule condition or in priority/tie-break resolution. 'No lower than before' allows equality, so monotonicity is satisfied for all 2^3 = 8 input combinations. The property holds.
